title: PME Digital Micro-Audit
tagline: Lightweight digital readiness report for Montreal SMBs — ESSOR-adjacent but sized for sub-$2.5M shops.

jtbd.situation: When a 15-person Rosemont shop needs digital tools but can't afford Big-4 ESSOR diagnostic
jtbd.persona: Owner of family manufacturing shop in Rosemont
jtbd.motivation: identify 3 high-ROI digital fixes before hiring integrator
jtbd.outcome: justify PME MTL loan or consultant spend with structured report
jtbd.statement: When modernizing ops, a Rosemont shop owner wants a micro digital audit so they prioritize the right $5K investments.

montrealAngle: ESSOR 1B requires $2.5M revenue — excludes most Montreal SMBs (72% have <10 employees). PME MTL pushes digital transformation but lacks lightweight self-serve entry.
whyNow: ESSOR Volet 1 open through Mar 2027 signals government priority; gap below revenue threshold.

persona.name: 10-30 employee Montreal Island SMB owner
persona.countSource: Statistique Québec — 72% employer firms have 1-9 employees; audit targets 10-30 subset

mvpScope.coreJob: 20-question diagnostic producing prioritized digital action PDF

assumptions.statement: Sub-ESSOR SMBs pay $199 for structured diagnostic
assumptions.testMethod: PME MTL advisor validates with 5 clients

g1_montrealAnchor.notes: ESSOR gap specifically hurts Montreal SMBs below revenue threshold.
